title: Perm、Perm Krai — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Perm、Perm Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Perm是Perm Krai的一個城市，人口約1,050,000。A major city on the Kama River in the Urals, known for its oil refining, aerospace industry, and vibrant contemporary art scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
